final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: children-book-illustration
Asset type: picture book spread illustration, suitable for ages 3–8
Primary request: a little red panda wearing round glasses and blue striped overalls, reading a book inside a cozy treehouse library
Scene/backdrop: warm treehouse library interior; bookshelves packed with colorful books on all sides; circular small window with autumn golden forest visible outside; sunlight streaming through the round window casting warm light patches on book pages
Subject: small red panda seated in a bean bag chair, holding a large open book; beside it a steaming mug of cocoa and a few cookies; a squirrel organizing books on a shelf; a little bunny napping in a corner
Style/medium: children's picture book illustration, flat digital painting with soft rounded linework, bright saturated colors, warm and playful
Composition/framing: medium wide interior shot, slightly elevated angle to show the full cozy room
Lighting/mood: warm golden afternoon sunlight through circular window, soft ambient light, cheerful and cozy mood
Color palette: warm golden yellows and oranges (autumn foliage outside), soft blues (overalls), rich warm browns (wood treehouse), bright multi-colored book spines, creamy warm whites
Materials/textures: smooth flat illustration surfaces, rounded soft edges, gentle cel-shading
Constraints: keep round glasses and blue striped overalls on the red panda; keep circular window; keep squirrel on bookshelf and bunny napping in corner; autumn forest visible outside window
Avoid: realistic or photographic rendering, sharp harsh lines, dark or scary atmosphere, adult aesthetic
